notes: Radix dropdown trigger ids (radix-:rX:) and other :rN: ids are React-generated and NOT stable across renders/sessions — locate dropdowns by visible trigger text, never by id.
name= and stable id= selectors below are safe to use directly.
The app NEVER submits — the user manually reviews and clicks submit (CLAUDE.md).

sellForm._note: Chrome status probe config (ui/chrome-status.js). The probe is READ-ONLY: one HTTP GET of :9222/json/list — no WebSocket to a page target, no Runtime.enable, no page script. urlPattern marks a tab as a fresh Sell form; loginUrlPatterns mark a Grailed tab sitting on a signup/login route (public URL signal only — the probe never reads cookies or credentials, login stays manual per PRD §8.2).

_timing._note: fillAutocomplete pacing (bug G hardening, plan §G). pollMs × pollTries = the per-attempt suggestion-wait budget (~4s, proven live 2026-07-03/04). retries = extra type→poll→click attempts after a failed commit; retryBackoffMs grows per retry. The click fires only once the suggestion list SETTLES (same items on two consecutive polls) or the budget runs out with a match still showing.

designer.note: disabled until a category is chosen
designer.technique: PROVEN (2026-07-03, via fillListing live run): identical to countryOfOrigin — clear + focus, REAL typing via Input.insertText, REAL mouse click on the suggestion li. 'Carhartt' typed → suggestion clicked → value persisted past blur.

countryOfOrigin.technique: PROVEN (2026-07-03): free-text set does NOT persist (React wipes it on blur) and synthetic pointer events on the suggestion do nothing. What works: clear + focus the input, type the country via REAL CDP Input.insertText, wait ~900ms for the suggestion <li> (inside the field's div.section container, class CountryOfOrigin-module__menuItem — match by text, not class), scrollIntoView, then a REAL CDP Input mouse click at the li's center. Value then persists past blur.

dropdowns._technique: PROVEN (step 7): locate the trigger button by visible text; open with dispatched pointerdown+pointerup (a plain .click() does NOT open Radix); the menu is role=menu with role=menuitem options; select by dispatching pointerdown+pointerup+click on the menuitem whose text matches. Trigger ids are dynamic — after selecting, re-read the trigger by its session id to confirm its label updated. Do NOT match [data-radix-collection-item] (that also matches the site's top-nav menu). Once a value is selected the trigger's visible text BECOMES that value (placeholder gone) — locate triggers by placeholder OR any known option value, preferring exact text matches.
dropdowns._dependentFieldsPolicy: A1 IN PROGRESS (2026-07-03): the nested category mechanism is now PROVEN (see category.technique) and being automated behind STAGED CONFIRMATION — the app suggests a department/category from attributes, the USER confirms it, and only then are subcategory/size/designer filled. Rationale unchanged: category gates the rest and a wrong category cascades into wrong sizes, so the cascade is never blind-filled. Title/description/price/condition + photos remain the always-safe autofill set.

category.technique: PROVEN (2026-07-03, phase0b-category-probe.js): an IN-PLACE two-click drill, NOT a hover submenu (top-level items have aria-haspopup=null; hover reveals nothing). (1) Open the trigger with the proven synthetic pointerdown+pointerup+click (Radix opens on pointerdown). The field sits above the fold (negative viewport y) — use SYNTHETIC events, not CDP real-mouse clicks, which need on-screen coords. (2) Click the department menuitem (Menswear/Womenswear) — the SAME role=menu container re-renders in place into the category list (department items gone; no 'back' menuitem). (3) Click the category menuitem — the menu CLOSES, the trigger label becomes 'Department / Category' (e.g. 'Menswear / Outerwear'), and subcategory/size/designer flip from disabled to enabled (the cascade). Idempotency: if the trigger already shows the wanted 'Dept / Cat', skip. State: a menu left open from a prior action makes a trigger click TOGGLE it shut — send Escape first to reset. Zero detection signals across probe runs (§8.5 caveat still applies).

tree._note: Menswear captured live 2026-07-03. Womenswear is a BEST-EFFORT list, NOT yet verified against the live menu — the driver doesn't validate against this tree (a wrong entry fails gracefully with Grailed's actual options), it only feeds the app's category picker UI. Verify + correct on first Womenswear listing.

subcategory.note: flat radix dropdown; disabled until a category is chosen, then enabled + repopulated from it. PROVEN live 2026-07-03 via selectDropdown. CAVEAT: option match is exact-then-substring, and Grailed's labels are specific ('Long Sleeve T-Shirts', 'Short Sleeve T-Shirts') — a vague app value like 'T-Shirt' matches the FIRST substring hit. The pipeline's free-text subcategory ('graphic t-shirt', 'sweatshirt') usually matches NOTHING (found live 2026-07-04) — appValueRules below translate it before the fill; unmatched values pass through raw and the fill result reports what was actually clicked.

appValueRules._note: app free-text subcategory → Grailed option label, keyed by the CONFIRMED Grailed category. Applied in ui/main.js before autofill:fill; first matching case-insensitive regex wins; no key / no match = raw value passes through (driver fails cleanly listing what WAS available). Tops option list captured live 2026-07-04; add other categories as they come up. Outerwear list added 2026-07-04 (real run: 'light jacket' passed through raw and matched nothing) — labels are BEST-EFFORT, not captured live; a wrong label fails cleanly listing Grailed's actual options.
Outerwear: light( ?weight)? jacket|windbreaker|coach(es)? jacket|harrington|track jacket|shell|zip[- ]?up jacket|shirt jacket|chore|work(wear)? jacket|fleece|\bjacket\b|\bcoat\b

size.note: flat radix dropdown; disabled until a category is chosen, then enabled + repopulated from it. PROVEN live 2026-07-03. Option labels are COMPOUND: 'US M / EU 48-50 / 2' (tops) — match with the anchored 'US {size} /' form first (a raw 'S' substring-hits 'US XS…'), falling back to raw text; the driver does this. Once set, the trigger label becomes the option text (placeholder gone) — the 'US {size} /' candidate re-finds it.

appValueMap._note: Keys are matched case-insensitively; covers both the UI's CONDITIONS list and pipeline/vision.js's condition_rating enum. null = leave for manual selection.

smartPricing._note: Grailed's NATIVE Smart Pricing (plan §I), re-captured live 2026-07-12 with a read-only phase0b-footprint probe. The seller enables it and sets a floor; Grailed then lowers the price ~10%/week toward the floor. The app fills these ONLY for items whose seller opted in (DraftEditor/PricePanel toggle, default OFF) — never auto-enabled, never autonomous; the user still reviews and Publishes. CAVEAT found live: Grailed's own fresh form renders the toggle ALREADY ON with an empty floor — the driver treats 'already checked' as alreadySet and only ever sets it to the opted-in state; it never touches the section for non-opted-in items.
smartPricing.toggleNote: type=checkbox behind a styled switch label (SellFormCheckbox _switch); the input itself is visible — synthetic el.click() toggles it (verify checked after).
smartPricing.floorNote: type=tel, placeholder 'Floor Price (USD)'; digits only, same technique as price

fill._note: fillListing step isolation (plan §K): every field step is time-capped and runs isolated — a thrown/hung field (the tester's collab-designer hang) is marked failed and the fill CONTINUES; it never aborts the run. Photos are filled FIRST (right after the fresh form opens) so a flaky cascade/designer can never cost them. The §8.1 detection abort (AutofillAbort) still stops everything immediately. photoStepTimeoutMs is larger — up to 9 real uploads.

photos.note: one file input per slot (photo_input_0..8, aria-label 'Upload photo'); use CDP DOM.setFileInputFiles per input — no drag/drop

submit.note: NOT automated. Left to the user by design (PRD §4/§5.5, CLAUDE.md).
